profile_basis.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass47-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/reduce_window_64x64_3x3_same_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

lever.description: Pack literal-backed rank-2 F64 3x3 SAME reduce_window input once into a contiguous f64 slab, then run the existing row-major clipped-border and nine-add interior order over that slab. Dense F64 inputs borrow their existing slab; malformed declared-F64 tensors fall back to the literal path.
lever.alien_primitive: vectorized execution over cache-local scalar slabs; compiled runtime artifact is a packed F64 view rather than repeated enum decoding

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass47-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/reduce_window_64x64_3x3_same_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Row-major output order is unchanged. Interior cells preserve the exact old nine-add sequence: top row left-to-right, center row left-to-right, bottom row left-to-right. Border cells preserve the old clipped-window row-major loop order.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Only Literal decoding is moved out of the inner loop. F64 bits are converted with f64::from_bits, and additions occur in the same order as before.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparison or tie-breaking behavior is involved in sum reduce_window.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or random primitive is touched.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Non-F64 literal storage in a declared-F64 tensor returns None from the packed view and executes the pre-existing literal path.

validation: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass47-test-20260603 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax reduce_window_rank2_f64_same_sum --lib -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass47-check-20260603 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass47-clippy-20260603 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

ubs.result: Existing monolithic fj-lax inventory: clippy/fmt/check clean inside UBS, but UBS reports pre-existing panic/test and warning surfaces outside this patch.
